description.ko: 네온 불빛과 몬순의 빗줄기가 어우러져 우울하면서도 낭만적인 도시 경관을 만들어내는 미래 대도시의 광활한 풍경입니다.
description.en: A sweeping view of a futuristic metropolis where neon light and monsoon rain merge to create a melancholic yet romantic urban landscape.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Electric Zenith.' Towering #1A0033 indigo megastructures are linked by sky-bridges pulsing with #FF00FF magenta neon and #00FFFF cyan holographic data streams. Heavy monsoon rain creates vibrant, distorted reflections on wet metallic asphalt. High-speed maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through dense, smoky volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced puddle reflections, and lens flares from flickering neon signs. 8k resolution, capturing the romantic and melancholic soul of a futuristic megacity.
